summary: Plan-only classification kept #59616 as the live canonical issue. #90653 is the related open fix candidate for the same include-file hot-reload root cause, but no merge, fixed-by closeout, or fix artifact is planned because this job blocks merge/fix/raise_pr and the hydrated PR still lacks merge preflight with a failed Scan changed paths check.
